## Checklist

- [ ] All SKILL.md files have valid frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `metadata.version`)
- [ ] `./scripts/validate-skills.sh --no-skills-ref` passes
- [ ] All scripts are executable and pass `--help`
- [ ] No `[placeholder]` text in any file
- [ ] Code examples are real and production-grade (no stubs)
- [ ] Version bumped in SKILL.md for modified skills
